hero.subtitle: QuickTow is Pakistan's fastest emergency towing service. Get a tow truck dispatched to your location in under 30 minutes.

services.title: Complete Towing Solutions
services.subtitle: We offer a full range of roadside assistance and towing services to get you back on the road safely.

standard.name: Standard Tow
standard.desc: Regular towing for sedans, hatchbacks and small vehicles. Safe and affordable transportation to your desired destination.

flatbed.name: Flatbed Carrier
flatbed.desc: Premium flatbed towing for luxury cars, AWD vehicles and sports cars. Zero damage guarantee with secure strapping.

accident.name: Accident Recovery
accident.desc: Emergency recovery for accident-damaged vehicles. Our trained team handles wrecked cars with utmost care and professionalism.

battery.name: Battery Jump Start
battery.desc: Dead battery? We come to you with professional jump start equipment to get your vehicle running again in minutes.

fuel.name: Fuel Delivery
fuel.desc: Ran out of fuel on the highway? We deliver emergency fuel to your location so you can reach the nearest gas station.

repair.name: Minor Repairs
repair.desc: On-spot minor mechanical repairs and fixes. Our skilled mechanics can handle common roadside issues immediately.

how.title: 3 Simple Steps to Get Help
how.subtitle: Getting a tow truck has never been easier. Just follow these simple steps.

step1.title: Fill the Form
step1.desc: Enter your details, vehicle info, pickup and dropoff locations on our booking page.

step2.title: Get Confirmation
step2.desc: Receive your unique tracking code instantly. Use it to track your tow truck in real-time.

step3.title: Driver Dispatched
step3.desc: Our nearest available driver is assigned and dispatched to your location immediately.

step4.title: Problem Solved
step4.desc: Your vehicle is safely towed or repaired. Pay only after the job is completed.

why.title: Why Thousands Trust QuickTow
why.subtitle: We are committed to providing the best roadside assistance experience in Pakistan.

fast.title: Lightning Fast Response
fast.desc: Average response time under 30 minutes. We understand urgency when you are stranded.

price.title: Transparent Pricing
price.desc: No hidden charges. You know the cost before we dispatch. Fair and honest pricing always.

insured.title: Fully Insured Service
insured.desc: Complete insurance coverage for your vehicle during towing. Your peace of mind is our priority.

tracking.title: Real-Time Tracking
tracking.desc: Track your tow truck on a live map. Know exactly when help will arrive at your location.

drivers.title: Professional Drivers
drivers.desc: Trained and verified drivers who handle your vehicle with care and respect.

available247.title: 24/7 Availability
available247.desc: Day or night, rain or shine. We are always ready to help you when you need it most.

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real reviews from real people who trusted QuickTow in their time of need.
testimonials.review1: "My car broke down on the motorway at 2 AM. QuickTow dispatched a driver in just 20 minutes. Amazing service!"
testimonials.review2: "Had an accident near Islamabad. The recovery team was professional and handled my car very carefully. Highly recommended!"
testimonials.review3: "Best towing service in Pakistan. The real-time tracking feature is awesome. I could see the truck approaching on the map!"

cta.title: Need a Tow Truck Right Now?
cta.subtitle: Don't wait. Get immediate assistance with just one click.

booking.title: Request Tow Service
booking.subtitle: Fill in the details below for immediate dispatch
booking.name: Your Full Name
booking.pickup_ph: Where is the car right now?
booking.dropoff_ph: Where do you want to tow it?
booking.standard_desc: Regular towing for sedans & small cars
booking.flatbed_desc: Safe transport for luxury & AWD vehicles

tracking.title: Track Your Tow Truck
tracking.subtitle: Enter your tracking code to see real-time status and location
tracking.not_found: No booking found with this tracking code.
tracking.enter_code_desc: You will find the tracking code in your booking confirmation.
tracking.map_hint: Map will appear once driver is assigned and location is available

about.title: About QuickTow
about.subtitle: We provide reliable 24/7 towing and flatbed transportation services across the region. Your safety is our mission.

f1.title: 24/7 Availability
f1.desc: Round-the-clock emergency towing service. Day or night, rain or shine — we are always ready to dispatch.

f2.title: Modern Fleet
f2.desc: State-of-the-art tow trucks and flatbed carriers equipped to handle all vehicle types safely.

f3.title: Fast Response
f3.desc: Average response time of under 30 minutes. We understand urgency when you are stranded on the road.

f4.title: Insured & Licensed
f4.desc: Fully licensed operators with comprehensive insurance coverage for your peace of mind.

f5.title: Fair Pricing
f5.desc: Transparent pricing with no hidden charges. You know the cost before we dispatch.

f6.title: Wide Coverage
f6.desc: Serving all major highways and urban areas. No matter where you are, help is on the way.

blogs.title: Safety Insights & Updates
blogs.subtitle: Stay informed with the latest road safety tips and company news.
blogs.no_articles_desc: Stay tuned! Informative articles are on the way.

driver.title: Driver Portal
driver.subtitle: Sign in with your registered phone number
driver.no_bookings_desc: You have no active bookings right now. Check back later.

admin.title: Admin Console
admin.subtitle: Sign in to access the management panel
admin.no_bookings_desc: When customers book a tow, it will appear here.
admin.no_drivers_desc: Add drivers from the "Add Driver" tab.

footer.brand_desc: Pakistan's most trusted emergency towing service. Available 24/7 across all major cities and highways.
